parameters.apprise_url_plus: sns://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.access_key_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_access_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.region_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Amazon SNS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise sns:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

access_key_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Amazon SNS access key id

region_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Amazon SNS region

secret_access_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Amazon SNS secret access key

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Amazon SNS targets
